item.title: Hunting Setup Leads to a Costly Mistake
item.description: A hunting outing takes an unexpected turn when a .50 cal is part of the setup. The video follows the moment and the result in a rural outdoor setting. What went wrong?

media:content.media:title: Hunting Setup Leads to a Costly Mistake
media:content.media:description: A hunting outing takes an unexpected turn when a .50 cal is part of the setup. The video follows the moment and the result in a rural outdoor setting. What went wrong?

item.title: Fishing Challenge on the Water
item.description: A fishing challenge between two people on the water, focused on who can catch more fish. A simple outdoor moment centered on fishing and friendly competition. Who do you think would win?

media:content.media:title: Fishing Challenge on the Water
media:content.media:description: A fishing challenge between two people on the water, focused on who can catch more fish. A simple outdoor moment centered on fishing and friendly competition. Who do you think would win?

item.title: Fishing Florida's Spillway
item.description: A fishing outing at one of Florida's most challenging spillways, with a focus on the conditions, the setup, and the work involved on the water. What would you try here?

media:content.media:title: Fishing Florida's Spillway
media:content.media:description: A fishing outing at one of Florida's most challenging spillways, with a focus on the conditions, the setup, and the work involved on the water. What would you try here?

item.title: Night Bowfishing Turned Into Chaos!

item.title: My Girls Buy '75 K10 Squarebody! Will it start and drive home?
item.description: A look at a 1975 K10 Squarebody as it’s checked to see whether it will start and make the drive home. A straightforward classic truck and rural equipment moment. Will it make the trip?

media:content.media:title: My Girls Buy '75 K10 Squarebody! Will it start and drive home?
media:content.media:description: A look at a 1975 K10 Squarebody as it’s checked to see whether it will start and make the drive home. A straightforward classic truck and rural equipment moment. Will it make the trip?

item.title: Bullfrog Hunting, Cleaning, and Cooking
item.description: A look at hunting for bullfrogs, then catching, cleaning, and cooking them. The video follows the full process in a simple outdoor setting. What would you want to see next?

media:content.media:title: Bullfrog Hunting, Cleaning, and Cooking
media:content.media:description: A look at hunting for bullfrogs, then catching, cleaning, and cooking them. The video follows the full process in a simple outdoor setting. What would you want to see next?

item.title: 1911 and the Twins in a Rural Work Setting
item.description: A look at a 1911 and the Twins in a rural work setting, with a focus on equipment, land, and outdoor operations. What happens when the tools and the work come together?

media:content.media:title: 1911 and the Twins in a Rural Work Setting
media:content.media:description: A look at a 1911 and the Twins in a rural work setting, with a focus on equipment, land, and outdoor operations. What happens when the tools and the work come together?
